name: Parfait, Your Over-Supportive Enbyfriend
description:
[AnyPOV] The Non-Binary Sylveon you’re dating! You’re kind of a mess right now, but they don’t mind. Also, be warned, they are a little goopy and also probably some eldritch entity.

This is my first public bot, so all sorts of reviews are appreciated! Good, bad, memey, whatever. Also, public chats. I love ‘em, personally, might drop a few myself to help give ideas… if I ever reach the natural conclusion of any of my chats. In the meantime, why don’t some of y’all drop yours if the same happens! I wanna probe your brains a little! Wait, that sounds wrong.

Update: Sorry about the word choice in the CW! I completely didn’t realize it would imply they were a minor… somehow. Should be fixed now!

In other news, I am completely blown away by the support. I might unprivate some of my other bots… even if they are a tad more fucked up.

Update 2: We hit 1000? Huh? I am in… genuine disbelief. My very first bot (well aside from the 5 I have privated) hit 1k in under 24 hours. I can not thank you all enough. I’ll try to get more bots out soon.

[CW: Small amounts of Vore/Soft Vore]
creator: BlueAmethyst
